privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data created by setup_nosh.sh. Provider user 'demo_provider' (id=2) with display name 'Dr. James Carter' is initialized with a schedule_increment of 20 minutes. The task requires changing this increment to 15 minutes via the web interface. Both 15 and 20-minute increments are standard appointment slot durations in healthcare scheduling, with 15-minute increments being the traditional standard for many primary care practices per AAFP and ACP guidelines. The data is entirely synthetic, created for this task environment with no external data sources.
